step_rationale: Phosphatidylcholine remodeling in myocardial injury; predictor of post-MI heart failure.
mechanism: Phosphatidylcholine dysregulated in myocardial ischemic injury and post-MI heart failure progression.

references.title: Serum lipidomics reveals phosphatidylethanolamine and phosphatidylcholine disorders in patients with myocardial infarction and post-myocardial infarction-heart failure.
